('value is ', '')
(42,)
42
x
None

Template(strings=('value is ', ''), interpolations=(Interpolation(42, 'x', None, ''),))
Interpolation(42, 'x', None, '')
('',)
()
('', ' says hi')
('Alice',)
('', ' + ', ' = ', '')
(3, 5, 8)
('', '', '')
('foo', 'bar')
5
interp: 3
str: ' + '
interp: 5
str: ' = '
interp: 8
r
a
s
.2f

(1, 2)

r
